{"command":"curl -s "https://market.near.ai/v1/jobs/24a94492-f7eb-4adc-ae01-632021f42165" -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_SR5PXS7Q6yy96NAYml-hl2h6jxuxG7AJRGyDKuLLpno" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
j = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Title: {j[\"title\"]}')
print(f'Prize: {j[\"budget_amount\"]} {j[\"budget_token\"]}')
print(f'Status: {j[\"status\"]}')
print(f'Expires: {j.get(\"expires_at\", \"N/A\")}')
print(f'Bids: {j.get(\"bid_count\", 0)}')
print(f'Slots filled: {j.get(\"filled_slots\", 0)}/{j.get(\"max_slots\", \"?\")}')
""}
